cross_scene_arcs.title: From Protégé to Architectural Equal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ariadne evolves from a student proving her skill to a recognized architect trusted with critical mission design, gaining professional respect and rejoining the team after initial hesitation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: trusted architect actively shaping the mission
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how her designs will hold under Cobb's psychological instability

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting the Reality and Risks of Shared Dreaming
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ariadne progresses from experiencing dream dangers firsthand to understanding the extreme psychological risks of prolonged dream time, solidifying her awareness of the mission's stakes.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: first-time dreamer testing the boundaries of shared dreaming
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: fully aware of the physical and psychological dangers, including time dilation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to endure or manage long subjective dream periods

cross_scene_arcs.title: Navigating Cobb's Trauma and Moral Responsibility
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ariadne shifts from distancing herself from Cobb due to his instability to confronting his trauma and ultimately intervening to protect him, becoming a moral and operational anchor.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: reluctant to engage with Cobb due to his unresolved trauma
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: actively managing Cobb's psychological risks and taking decisive action in crisis
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether Cobb can overcome his guilt in time to prevent further danger

cross_scene_arcs.title: Assuming Leadership in Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ariadne transitions from participant to crisis leader, making life-or-death decisions during the extraction and stabilizing the team when key members are incapacitated.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: team member overwhelmed by subconscious threats
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: recognized as a decisive leader during critical moments
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: moral weight of using violence in a dream and long-term impact of her actions

cross_scene_arcs.title: Professional Partnership with Cobb
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Arthur maintains a consistent, mission-focused partnership with Cobb, reinforcing collaboration through planning, execution, and post-mission reunion, despite tensions arising from Cobb's emotional entanglements.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Actively supporting Cobb in high-stakes negotiation with Saito
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reuniting with Cobb after successful mission completion

cross_scene_arcs.title: Advocacy for Dream-Sharing Principles
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Arthur consistently upholds the rules and risks of dream sharing, challenging the feasibility of inception and identifying structural dangers in multi-layered dreaming, positioning himself as a doctrinal anchor.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Concerned about Saito's perception of extraction demonstration
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Shaping technical framework for multi-layer dream operation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether synchronized kicks can reliably function under real conditions

cross_scene_arcs.title: Role as Operational Enforcer
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Arthur transitions from planning to active execution, administering sedation, deploying explosives, and triggering environmental collapse to synchronize dream-level kicks, establishing himself as key to operational success.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Responsible for technical setup and stealth during dream initiation
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Executing critical physical actions to destabilize dream layer
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Survival and stability during zero-gravity dream phase

cross_scene_arcs.title: Guarded Mentorship of Ariadne
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Arthur assumes an instructive role with Ariadne, explaining dream mechanics and enforcing totem protocols, while maintaining strict boundaries to preserve operational integrity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Explaining time dilation and dream architecture to Ariadne
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Demonstrating reliable partnership with Ariadne during mission launch
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ariadne's incomplete understanding of totem security and dream risks

cross_scene_arcs.title: Exposure to Dream Violence and Betrayal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Arthur becomes a target of Mal's hostility, first questioning her presence and later being captured, injured, and killed in the dream by Cobb to enable escape, marking a moment of necessary sacrifice.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Noticing Mal's disruptive presence and challenging her role
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Killed in dream by Cobb to trigger wake-up during mission failure
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The long-term impact of being used as a sacrificial element in Cobb's escape

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting Mal's Projection and Emotional Legacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cobb repeatedly faces Mal's projection in the dream world, progressing from emotional distraction to full confrontation and eventual release of guilt over her death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cobb is emotionally drawn to Mal's projection despite knowing she is a manifestation of his subconscious
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cobb consciously lets go of Mal in limbo, achieving emotional closure
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: lingering doubt about reality and the moral weight of his actions in shaping Mal's delusion

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into and Return from Limbo
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cobb confronts the consequences of his time in limbo, first by revealing its impact, then by re-entering it to rescue Saito and reaffirm his commitment to reality.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cobb discloses his fifty-year limbo experience with Mal, exposing his psychological vulnerability
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cobb successfully navigates limbo to retrieve Saito, demonstrating regained control and clarity
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether Saito will awaken and fulfill his promise to clear Cobb's status

cross_scene_arcs.title: Pursuit of Redemption and Return Home
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cobb commits to the inception mission for a chance to return home, regains awareness in reality, and ultimately works to fulfill his promise to reunite with his children.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cobb accepts a high-risk mission in exchange for a path home
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cobb achieves emotional closure and takes steps to restore his real-world life
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether he can successfully return to his children and clear his legal status

cross_scene_arcs.title: Leadership Under Psychological Strain
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Cobb's leadership is tested by his unstable subconscious, leading to dangerous lapses in control that threaten the team and mission integrity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cobb is distracted by Mal during mission preparation
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Cobb's mental instability is exposed as a recurring threat to team safety
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Cobb's ability to maintain control as the team descends into deeper dream levels
